# datahub_domains (Data Source)

**DataHub ✅ | DataHub Cloud ✅**

Returns the URNs of all DataHub domains visible to the authenticated principal, across all levels of the domain hierarchy.

Backed by `searchAcrossEntities` (OpenSearch). Domains created within the last few seconds may not yet appear. Use the returned `urns` list as the `for_each` value in `import {}` blocks to bulk-import an existing domain hierarchy into Terraform state.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "datahub_domains" "all" {}

output "domain_urns" {
  description = "URNs of all DataHub domains."
  value       = data.datahub_domains.all.urns
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `urns` (List of String) List of DataHub URNs for all domains (e.g. `["urn:li:domain:marketing"]`).
